$comment: No crons. The X stats sync (/api/cron/snapshot) is the only thing in this
system that READS from X, and reads were ~99% of the X bill — posting ran
5-14 requests/day while reads ran 700-6,400. The sync's OAuth 2.0 client
secret was regenerated on 2026-07-21 without being redeployed, so the sync
cannot authenticate; removing the schedule stops it retrying daily.
To turn stats back on: set X_CLIENT_SECRET in Vercel to the new value,
reconnect X on the dashboard, and restore the cron below. Be aware that
